positive.prompt: Set up skills-evals in this repo
Add evals for my skills and custom agents
Test whether my skill is triggering correctly
Add regression tests for my Cursor rules and instructions
Why isn't my skill being picked up by the agent?

negative.prompt: Draft a commit message for these changes

evals.prompt: Set up skills-evals in a repo that has one SKILL.md and no eval cases yet.
evals.expected_output: Runs discovery, scaffolds evals/cases/<name>.json with realistic triggers, wires a runner, and creates a committed baseline.
expectations: Inventories artifacts with `skills-evals list` (or init) before writing any case
Writes an eval case with at least 3 positive and 2 negative triggers that do not copy the description
Wires a runner (npm script and/or CI) and creates .skills-evals/baseline.json
